phases.name: Phase 0: Foundation & Scaffolding
phases.description: Restructure existing React app for 9-screen tiered route layout

phases.name: Phase 1: Chat Screen
phases.description: Build primary conversational interface. Replaces Streamlit Chat UI.

phases.name: Phase 2: Query Debugger & DB Explorer
phases.description: Replace QA Tool's core functionality in React.

phases.name: Phase 3: Admin Screens
phases.description: Build Publisher Authorities and System Health pages.

phases.name: Phase 4: Polish, Integration & Testing
phases.description: Cross-screen integration, shared components, test suite.

phases.name: Phase 5: Retirement & Cleanup
phases.description: Remove Streamlit code, archive, update docs.

risks.mitigation: Start with HTTP-only, add WebSocket as enhancement
New API reads existing QA SQLite directly
Vite code splitting automatic per route
